definition.config: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="config_start" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">stone_selection_rules_settings</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">limit_number_stones</field><field name="comment">Limits the number of stones to receive and includes their uniqueness</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">limit_number_stones</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value></block></statement><next><block type="config_category"><field name="name">additional_features</field><statement name="write"><block type="config_variable"><field name="name">enable_levels</field><field name="comment">Enables and disables the level system</field><value name="value"><block type="config_logic_variable"><field name="name">enable_levels</field><field name="value">true</field></block></value></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
